productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherette Pink Sling Bag
description: This stylish sling bag from lino perros is designed for the fashion conscious. Wear it across or on your shoulder and be the cynosure of all eyes. Height: 25 cm Width: 20 cm Depth: 5 cm Made of synthetic leather for durability One main zipped pocket with an inner zipped pocket and a mobile pouch One compartment on the front with a flap over the mouth of the bag and a magnetic buttoned closure One zipped pocket on the back On long, removable and adjustable strap for carrying ease and style Stitch detailing, branded zips and brand badge appliqué d on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
